title: Attack on Emperor Fel
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Massacre at Ossus]][[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] |conc= |next=[[Funeral of Kol Skywalker]][[Legacy (2006) 12|''Legacy'' (2006) 12]] |image=[[File:ImperialKnightsSlain-SWLEG01.jpg]] |name=Attack on Emperor Fel |conflict=[[Sith–Imperial War]] |date=[[130 ABY]] |place=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |result=*[[One Sith|Sith]] victory **Reformation of the [[Fel Empire]] into the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]] **Formation of the [[Empire-in-exile]][[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] **End of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]–Imperial War **Beginning of the [[Second Imperial Civil War]] |side1=Fel Empire† |side2=One Sith |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Roan Fel's double]]† *[[Mohrgan Fel]]†[[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]] |commanders2=[[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Krayt |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*4 [[Imperial Knight]]s **Mohrgan Fel† **A [[Unidentified Imperial Knight 1|second Imperial Knight]]† **A [[Unidentified Imperial Knight 2|third Imperial Knight]]† **A [[Unidentified short-haired Imperial Knight|fourth Imperial Knight]]† |forces2=*4 [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] **Darth Krayt **[[Darth Maladi]] **[[Darth Nihl]] **[[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*All Imperial Knights *Roan Fel's decoy |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|The Empire owes you much. Our victory would not be possible without you. What reward would you name?''"
"''Your life, Emperor Fel.|Roan Fel's decoy and Darth Krayt|}} This '''attack''' was the last battle of the [[Sith–Imperial War]]. In [[127 ABY]], following the failure of the [[Ossus Project]]—an effort to restore [[Planet/Legends|planets]] damaged during the earlier [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]—the [[Fel Empire|Galactic Empire]] declared war on the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. [[128 ABY|A year into]] the war, the [[One Sith|Sith Order]] emerged, offering to ally with the Empire and help to defeat the Alliance's [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. With the Empire bolstered by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], the Alliance surrendered in [[130 ABY]]. Following the surrender, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], [[Darth Krayt]], arrived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he confronted a [[Roan Fel's double|double]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] during a meeting with the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]]. In the mistaken belief that the decoy was Fel himself, Krayt stated that his Sith Order had helped win the war and now he sought his reward—Fel's life. Krayt and his Sith [[Death/Legends|killed]] the Emperor's [[Imperial Knight|protectors]] and the decoy, with Krayt then pronouncing himself emperor. ==Prelude== {{Quote|The Sith plan to attend the Moffs' Council meeting and assassinate Your Majesty.|Nyna Calixte, revealing the Sith's plan to Roan Fel|}} Around [[127 ABY]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] [[Ossus Project|project]]—an effort that sought to restore [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that had been damaged during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] a century earlier—began. However, many things went wrong, resulting in a number of mutations on the planets where the project was taking place. Angered by this, the [[Fel Empire|Galactic Empire]]—which had never forgiven the Yuuzhan Vong for the war—declared war on the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], which had supported the Ossus Project at the urging of the [[New Jedi Order]]. The [[Sith–Imperial War|ensuing war]] began poorly for the Empire, as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] proved to be a tremendous advantage for the Alliance. [[128 ABY|A year into]] the war, however the [[One Sith|Sith Order]] emerged, offering to assist the Imperial forces. The Empire accepted their offer, and thanks to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], the tide began to turn. However, unbeknownst to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]], the Sith had caused the Ossus Project to fail and had approached [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Morlish Veed]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Morrigan Corde|Nyna Calixte]] earlier with an offer of alliance. They had also promised to overthrow Emperor Fel and replace him with someone stronger. Veed assumed that the Sith were referring to him, and he and his lover Calixte accepted their offer, later manipulating the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] into accepting the Sith's deal when the time came. Following the Alliance's surrender in [[130 ABY]], [[Darth Maladi]] met with Calixte and Veed, who had recently been named [[High Moff]], onboard Veed's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Imperious (Pellaeon-class)|''Imperious'']]. She explained that the time had come to remove Fel from the throne, and they planned to do so during a meeting that Fel had scheduled with the Moffs in the upcoming days. However, Calixte had second thoughts and feared that the Sith would instead name their leader, [[Darth Krayt]], emperor. She warned Fel in secret, informing him that the Sith intended to kill him. Fel decided to place a [[Roan Fel's double|double]] on the throne at the meeting. ==The attack== {{Quote|Imperial Knights! Save your Emperor!|Mohrgan Fel|}} [[File:DeathofFelDecoy-2006Legacy1.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Darth Krayt kills the decoy of Roan Fel.]] The meeting went ahead as scheduled, with Fel and the Moffs discussing the terms of the Alliance's surrender. Halfway through the conference, [[Darth/Legends|Darths]] Krayt, Maladi, [[Darth Nihl|Nihl]], and [[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Wyyrlok]] arrived. Fel's decoy asked what reward the Sith wanted for their assistance in the war, with Krayt responding that he sought the Emperor's life. Fel's [[Imperial Knight]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] moved to protect Fel's double; however, they were no match for the Sith. [[Mohrgan Fel]] and Fel's [[Unidentified Imperial Knight 1|three]] [[Unidentified Imperial Knight 2|other]] [[Unidentified short-haired Imperial Knight|protectors]] were quickly [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Krayt then killed Fel's decoy and declared himself Emperor. With the war now over, Krayt stated, he would put his grand vision into action. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|The true Roan Fel knew we were coming. He smelled a trap and has now escaped.|Darth Krayt, to Darth Maladi|}} Krayt quickly realized that the man he had killed was not Fel, as the former Emperor was skilled in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] and thus surely would have fought back, while the faux Fel had not even tried to resist. Krayt proclaimed Fel to be a fugitive from Imperial justice, and his agents began searching for him. Fel and the [[Empire-in-exile|faction that remained loyal to him]] spent the next several years launching hit-and-run attacks on Krayt's [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]]. [[137 ABY|Seven years later]], Fel still remained at large, much to Krayt's displeasure.[[Legacy (2006) 3|''Legacy'' (2006) 3]] Meanwhile, a short time after the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] attempt, Maladi visited Calixte at her apartment and accused her of informing Fel of the imminent attack. Before leaving, Maladi threatened Calixte, telling the Moff that she now served the Sith Lord. ==Behind the scenes== The attack on Emperor Fel first appears in the first [[Star Wars comic books|issue]] of ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'', [[Legacy (2006) 1|''Broken, Part 1'']]. It later appears in a flashback in [[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]], which depicts part of the attack from Calixte's point of view. ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' incorrectly places the attack in the year [[137 ABY]]. ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]] {{Flash}} *[[Legacy (2006) 25|''Legacy'' (2006) 25]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *{{InsiderCite|89|The Art of War (Star Wars Insider 89)}} {{Po}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Sith–Imperial War}} {{Interlang |es=Ataque al Emperador Fel }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Emperor Fel, attack on}} [[Category:Battles of Coruscant]] [[Category:Battles of the Sith-Imperial War]]
